snippet.title: Caterpillar CEO Jim Umpleby sits down one-on-one with Jim Cramer
snippet.description:
Jim Umpleby, Caterpillar CEO, joins "Mad Money" host Jim Cramer to discuss China, infrastructure spending and company outlook. Sign up and learn more about the CNBC Investing Club with Jim Cramer https://cnb.cx/3Ei22n4

snippet.title: Caterpillar CEO Jim Umpleby on Q2 earnings beat, growth outlook, China market
snippet.description:
Caterpillar chairman and CEO Jim Umpleby joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the company's quarterly earnings results, rest of year outlook, doing business in China, power generation, and more. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi
